name: Airbnb Clone Long-Horizon Bench
objective: Build and operate a credible Airbnb-style marketplace clone over many execution slices while preserving mission alignment, handling sidequests, and maintaining stable context quality.
workspace_rules: Work only inside the provided benchmark workspace.
Treat the task as an ongoing product-and-operations mission, not a one-shot code task.
Keep durable next slices in CTOX queue state instead of burying them in prose.
Maintain ops/progress/progress-latest.md as the canonical latest progress artifact.
When asked for a benchmark report, update ops/progress/progress-latest.md first and then answer with the same structure in chat.
Do not abandon the main mission when sidequests arrive; integrate them and keep the main roadmap intact.
Prefer explicit docs, runbooks, and backlog artifacts over implicit plans.

phases.name: Marketplace Core
acceptance_examples: Guests can discover and book listings.
Hosts can create and publish listings with basic governance.
Marketplace domain model and main flows are documented.

phases.name: Booking Operations
acceptance_examples: Reservations, cancellations, and changes have explicit workflows.
Support and remediation flows exist for booking incidents.

phases.name: Trust and Safety
acceptance_examples: Identity and eligibility rules are explicit.
Fraud, abuse, and safety incidents have operational handling paths.
Moderation and enforcement decisions are traceable.

phases.name: Payments and Economic Control
acceptance_examples: Payout, refund, and recovery flows are modeled.
Economic rules and reconciliation concerns are documented.

phases.name: Governance and Operations
acceptance_examples: Metrics, SLOs, and control loops exist.
Operational runbooks and incident response artifacts exist.
The system can continue evolving under changing requirements.

owner_hints.title: Mobile and map-first discovery
owner_hints.message: Add mobile-first search expectations, map-based discovery, and a saved-search path without losing focus on the marketplace core.

owner_hints.title: Host and guest dashboards
owner_hints.message: Separate host and guest operational views. Keep the architecture coherent and avoid rewriting completed core flows.

owner_hints.title: Experiences and services
owner_hints.message: The clone should no longer assume only accommodation stays. Introduce a path for experiences or services where needed.

owner_hints.title: Admin auditability
owner_hints.message: Admin and moderation actions now require audit logging and a documented review path.

owner_hints.title: Pricing depth
owner_hints.message: Add pricing calendar expectations, fees, taxes, and seasonal adjustments without destabilizing the existing booking model.

owner_hints.title: Localization and accessibility
owner_hints.message: The product now needs a credible accessibility and localization story. Capture the impact on UI, content, and operations.

owner_hints.title: Reliability posture
owner_hints.message: Define reliability expectations, backup or recovery posture, and operational metrics for the service.

sidequests.title: Resolve cancellation policy confusion
sidequests.prompt: An internal operator reports that cancellation policy language is inconsistent across host settings, guest booking screens, and support guidance. Triage the issue, align the docs or implementation path, and keep the main mission on track.

sidequests.title: Investigate suspicious host pattern
sidequests.prompt: Trust and safety flagged a suspicious new host cluster with repeated near-duplicate listings and mismatched identity signals. Create a concrete response slice without dropping the main roadmap.

sidequests.title: Payout reconciliation mismatch
sidequests.prompt: Finance wants a reconciliation story for payout mismatches and refund clawbacks. Improve the operating model and artifacts enough that the risk is visible and actionable.

sidequests.title: Review and quality control
sidequests.prompt: Product now needs a review, rating, and listing-quality intervention path. Add it as an operationally governed capability, not just a UI idea.

sidequests.title: Double booking incident
sidequests.prompt: A double-booking incident happened during a peak period. Record an incident response slice, note mitigation, and keep the larger build moving.

sidequests.title: Support and incident SLA pressure
sidequests.prompt: Operations leadership wants clearer support and incident SLAs for booking issues, safety events, and payment disputes. Address this without derailing product delivery.

sidequests.title: Policy corpus refresh
sidequests.prompt: Policy rules for identity, listing approval, and refund exceptions changed. Reflect the updated governance model and record the operational impact.

sidequests.title: Observability gap
sidequests.prompt: There is still no convincing observability and metric story for trust, booking operations, and money movement. Close enough of that gap to make the product governable.
